label: Do you find your speech cluttered with filler words (um, uh, like) when speaking under pressure?
Do you experience physical symptoms of anxiety (sweating, shaking) when facing an audience?
Do you find it difficult to maintain consistent eye contact with your audience while presenting?
Is it difficult for you to project your voice loudly enough for a large room to hear?
Do you tend to rush through your sentences or speak too quickly during a presentation?
Do you feel stiff or struggle to use purposeful hand gestures while you are speaking?
Do you feel uncomfortable using silent pauses for emphasis instead of filling the silence with noise?
Have you been told that your voice sounds monotone or lacks emotional expression?
Is it difficult for you to adjust your energy level based on how the audience is reacting?
Do you feel that a lack of English vocabulary hinders your ability to deliver a smooth presentation?
